Message:
I keep meaning to tidy our shared drive — old specs and slides are cluttering the place, and it slows people down.

Response:
Totally — a messy shared drive is a silent time sink. A short, time‑boxed cleanup plus simple naming/retention rules usually makes a noticeable difference.
